message:
fix: Mark external packs as always enabled in listing

External packs loaded via custom_paths are auto-enabled by convention
(same behavior as in test_command_inner). Previously the code checked
enabled_packs.contains(id) which was always false since external pack
IDs weren't added to the enabled set during listing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
